creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for your interest in the port. This PR is closed since 
x.y.9X versions are development but not stable releases. If 
you want to track them concider creating a gammu-devel port. 
See also: 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133269 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138256 
Uh, it's becoming a real FAQ! ;-)
